description: Implement Intel Report Generator and Enrichment Service, update SecurityEngine integration, and add comprehensive unit tests for the entire threat_intel module.
steps: Create src/threat_intel/include/threat_intel/IntelReportGenerator.h and src/threat_intel/src/IntelReportGenerator.cpp - Define ReportSection struct (title, content, data). IntelReport struct (id, title, generatedAt, summary, sections vector, topThreats vector, trendingIndicators vector, statistics map). IntelReportGenerator class with: generateReport(IOCManager&, ThreatCorrelationEngine&, ThreatScoringEngine&) -> IntelReport, generateThreatLandscape() summarizing current IOC counts by type/severity, getTopThreats(count) ranked by score, getTrendingIndicators(timeWindow) recently added/updated IOCs, toJson(report) -> nlohmann::json serialization

Create src/threat_intel/include/threat_intel/EnrichmentService.h and src/threat_intel/src/EnrichmentService.cpp - Define EnrichmentResult struct (originalIOC, relatedIOCs, campaigns, threatActors, ttps vector of MITRE technique IDs, additionalContext map). IEnrichmentProvider interface with virtual enrich(ioc) method. EnrichmentService class with: registerProvider(name, IEnrichmentProvider*), enrich(ioc) -> EnrichmentResult that queries all providers, enrichBatch(iocs) -> vector<EnrichmentResult>. Create LocalEnrichmentProvider that uses IOCManager + CorrelationEngine + MitreAttack to provide local enrichment. Add stub ExternalEnrichmentProvider with interface for VirusTotal/AbuseIPDB/AlienVault OTX (returns empty results since no network, but the interface is defined).

Create src/threat_intel/include/threat_intel/ThreatIntelEngine.h and src/threat_intel/src/ThreatIntelEngine.cpp - Facade class that owns IOCManager, ThreatFeedManager, MitreAttackMatrix, CVEDatabase, ThreatCorrelationEngine, IOCMatcher, ThreatScoringEngine, IntelReportGenerator, EnrichmentService. Provides initialize(), processIndicator(value) -> MatchResult + Score, ingestFeed(feedId, data), generateReport() -> IntelReport. Uses ModuleLogger.

Update src/security/include/security/SecurityEngine.h - Add a ThreatIntelEngine pointer member (forward declared), add method: checkThreatIntel(const std::string& indicator) that delegates to threat intel matching
Update src/security/src/SecurityEngine.cpp - Include ThreatIntelEngine.h, initialize ThreatIntelEngine in constructor, implement checkThreatIntel method
Update src/security/CMakeLists.txt - Add dependency on threatone_threat_intel in target_link_libraries
Create tests/threat_intel/ directory with comprehensive test files:
Create tests/threat_intel/test_ioc_manager.cpp - Test CRUD operations, search by value/type, expiration handling, thread safety
Create tests/threat_intel/test_feed_parsers.cpp - Test STIX JSON parsing, CSV parsing, plain text parsing with auto-detection, OpenIOC XML parsing, malformed input handling
Create tests/threat_intel/test_threat_feed_manager.cpp - Test feed subscription, feed data processing through parsers, feed refresh logic
Create tests/threat_intel/test_mitre_attack.cpp - Test technique lookup by ID, tactic-to-technique mapping, detection mapping, search
Create tests/threat_intel/test_cve_database.cpp - Test CVE add/get, search by product/vendor, severity filtering, CVSS scoring
Create tests/threat_intel/test_correlation.cpp - Test campaign detection from related IOCs, correlation scoring, related IOC finding
Create tests/threat_intel/test_ioc_matcher.cpp - Test exact hash matching, domain suffix matching, IP prefix matching, URL matching
Create tests/threat_intel/test_threat_scoring.cpp - Test score calculation with various inputs, age decay, source reliability, correlation boost
Create tests/threat_intel/test_report_generator.cpp - Test report generation, top threats, trending indicators, JSON serialization
Create tests/threat_intel/test_enrichment.cpp - Test local enrichment, provider registration, batch enrichment

Update tests/CMakeLists.txt - Add all new test files to TEST_SOURCES, add ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/threat_intel/include to target_include_directories, add threatone_threat_intel to target_link_libraries
acceptance_criteria: IntelReportGenerator produces reports with threat landscape, top threats, and trending indicators
EnrichmentService enriches IOCs with related data from local sources
ThreatIntelEngine facade wires all components together
SecurityEngine.checkThreatIntel delegates to the threat intel module
All unit tests pass via ctest --output-on-failure
Tests cover all major components: IOCManager, all 4 parsers, MITRE, CVE, correlation, matching, scoring, reports, enrichment
Full build (cmake --build build) completes without errors
verification: Confirm all tests pass including new threat_intel tests
findings: All 380 tests pass. doctest SUBCASEs in this project run sequentially within a single TEST_CASE invocation (they share state), so tests must use separate TEST_CASE blocks for isolation. The nlohmann json stub uses get_array() for iteration. STIX parser extractFromPattern uses first/last single-quote matching so patterns with inner quoted strings (like hashes.SHA-256) need unquoted style. MitreAttack searchTechniques only searches name and description fields, not dataSources. SecurityEngine now depends on threatone_threat_intel. Build takes ~3 minutes from clean.
